goal: Automate notarized NOC recording through ePN

phases.name: Upload notarized NOC
phases.action: Use ePN new submission entry + document upload flow
phases.output: Draft package with uploaded NOC PDF

phases.name: Fill recording metadata
phases.action: Populate required ePN metadata from job record

phases.name: Review fees/summary
phases.action: Capture fee quote and summary screen; do not pay/submit until approved

phases.name: Submit recording
phases.action: Click submit only in approved production runner

phases.name: Poll status
phases.action: Check ePN status/history until recorded or rejected

phases.name: Download recorded/stamped document
phases.action: Download from ePN recorded document path

phases.name: Finalize job
phases.action: Update noc_status = recorded, save recording_number + timestamps

manualBridge.useWhen: noc_status = notarized and admin records manually in ePN portal
